failure_modes.text: Cross-functional stretch can become shapelessness when no one owns the critical work.
failure_modes.mitigation: Assign clear ownership for critical work: cross-functional stretch without accountability creates shapelessness.

failure_modes.text: Breadth without trunk-and-branch depth creates superficiality that cannot carry real decisions.
failure_modes.source_quote: there is nothing for details to hang on to
failure_modes.mitigation: Maintain trunk-and-branch depth even while building breadth; superficiality that cannot carry real decisions is not adaptability.

failure_modes.text: Too much context or low-quality retrieval confuses the system instead of helping it adapt to constraints.
failure_modes.source_quote: if the search pulls in irrelevant or low-quality data bits
failure_modes.mitigation: Calibrate context and retrieval quality: too much information or poorly matched material confuses rather than enables adaptation.

premortem_questions.text: What must stay invariant here, and what can safely stretch across functional or formatting boundaries?
premortem_questions.source_quote: what can stretch and what must stay invariant

premortem_questions.text: Are we using elasticity to fit hard constraints, or to disguise missing expertise or ownership?
What assumptions in our current frame make it hard to stretch into this new context honestly?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What assumptions embedded in my current framework might be misleading

heuristics.text: Use self-interrogation to pull out executable tactics rather than vague confidence statements.
heuristics.source_quote: Can I make a great pitch?

heuristics.text: Summarize and surface only the most relevant context when the environment imposes hard processing limits.
Build elastic skill deployment on top of real underlying competence instead of replacing it.
heuristics.source_quote: fixed skills are punished, elastic skills are prized

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
